title: Porch Rain Archive
summary: A reviewed route pack about sorting rain notes, helping quiet archivists, and testing route-edge review flow.

scenes.title: Archive Awning
scenes.text: A dry awning covers a shelf of folded rain notes. Each note asks to be returned to the right porch hook.

scenes.title: Silver Bucket
scenes.text: A silver bucket catches one drop at a time. The pattern points toward three misplaced notes.

scenes.title: Window Catalog
scenes.text: A window catalog lists names, dates, and gentle weather signs. A missing entry waits for a careful hand.

npcs.title: Ora Index
npcs.clue: Ora says the archive opens when every note is returned without rushing.

npcs.title: Benji Drip
npcs.clue: Benji can hear which note belongs to which hook.

rewards.title: Dry Match
rewards.text: Gain a small item that keeps one clue dry.
rewards.clue: The match label names the window catalog.
